scenes.phrase: You've paid Spotify more money every single year since
2023. And artists are getting paid less
per stream than ever. Let me say that again, because it should be the most
insane sentence in the music industry, and somehow nobody
talks about it. You, the listener, are paying more for
Spotify today than you have ever paid
Then again in 2024. Then again in 2025
and they just announced another hike for 2026
